title: Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary
tagline: Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in Karnataka India, aimed for the protection of vultures.
overview.description: Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in Karnataka India, aimed for the protection of vultures. Established in 2012, it is the first Vulture Sanctuary in India. Of the nine vulture species found in India, three species, long-billed, Egyptian and white-backed vultures are found here. In 2018, Indian government tagged an area of 1.30 meters to 1.80 km from the boundary of the sanctuary as an eco-sensitive zone (ESZ).

topPlaces.name: Ramanagara
topPlaces.description: Ramanagara is a city in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is approximately 50 kilometres from Bengaluru.

topPlaces.name: Achalu (Ramanagaram)
topPlaces.description: Achalu (Ramanagaram) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Ramanagaram taluk of Bengaluru South district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Janapada Loka
topPlaces.description: Janapada Loka (lit. 'Folklore world or Folk-culture World'), is a folk museum that has an exclusive display of the village folk arts of Karnataka. It is under the aegis of the Karnataka Janapada Parishat.

items.note: Ramanagara is a city in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is approximately 50 kilometres from Bengaluru.
Achalu (Ramanagaram) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Ramanagaram taluk of Bengaluru South district in Karnataka.

Janapada Loka (lit. 'Folklore world or Folk-culture World'), is a folk museum that has an exclusive display of the village folk arts of Karnataka. It is under the aegis of the Karnataka Janapada Parishat.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (66 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramadevarabetta Vulture Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramanagara, Achalu (Ramanagaram), Janapada Loka.
